name: StmCreate_EnvVar
title: StmCreate_EnvVar
syntax: dword StmCreate_EnvVar(message aMessage, dbsignal aDBSignal, dbEnvVar aEnvVar, dword CycleTime);
dword StmCreate_EnvVar(signal aDBSignal, dbEnvVar aEnvVar, dword CycleTime);
description: Creates the stimulus with environment variables as data source.

parameters.name: CycleTime
parameters.description: ms; 1 < x < ∞ Defines the cycle in which the signal value in the message buffer is being updated. There is no affect to the bus.

return: Later this ID can be used to control the stimuli

description: To stimulate signals with the Interaction Layer:
example.code:
mId = StmCreate_EnvVar(MsgBuf, Msg::Sig, EnvVar, CycleTime);
mId = StmCreate_EnvVar(Msg::Sig, EnvVar, CycleTime);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
